description: A background timer or polling loop that wakes the device frequently, draining battery and getting the app OS-throttled.
body: Failure mode: the app polls or holds a wake lock on a short interval in the background, preventing the device from sleeping and burning battery and data. Detection signals: energy profiler shows frequent wake-ups; users report battery drain; the OS throttles or kills the app under Doze/App Standby. Do not poll on a tight timer or hold wake locks for routine background work. Safer fallback: replace polling with OS-scheduled batched jobs or push-triggered sync, back off on metered networks, and confirm reduced wake-ups in an energy trace.
